description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid, contoured body finished in a dark blue or black color. The body features a classic single-cutaway design, allowing easy access to the higher frets. The pickguard is a contrasting light gray, and the guitar is equipped with two single-coil pickups, a control plate with two knobs, and a switch. The neck is a light wood, likely maple, with a matching headstock that has six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy, well-crafted instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A solid-body electric guitar with a dark contoured body, light wood neck, and two single-coil pickups. Features a classic single-cutaway design and a light gray pickguard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark contoured body, light gray pickguard, two single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full maple neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the guitar's slim profile and the thickness of the body and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the dark body and the full length of the neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thinness of the guitar and the edge of the pickguard.
attribute_headstock_design: Six inline tuning pegs, elongated headstock, no visible logo
